creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-01 22:21:13 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-fonts            Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-fonts/montecarlo_fonts Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  MonteCarlo is a bitmap font suitable for code editors. All the characters
  have the same width, which is ideal for alignment. It is loosely derived
  from the look of the Monaco screen font that was available on the old MacOS
  systems. Some changes have been made to make it easier to differentiate
  certain symbols.
  
  WWW: http://bok.net/MonteCarlo/
  
  PR:             ports/128249
  Submitted by:   Dennis Herrmann <adox at mcx2.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.103     +1 -0      ports/x11-fonts/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/x11-fonts/montecarlo_fonts/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-fonts/montecarlo_fonts/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/x11-fonts/montecarlo_fonts/pkg-descr (new)
